title_en: Ibn Abi Shaybah: Life and Legacy
title_id: Ibn Abi Shaybah: Kehidupan dan Warisan Ilmiahnya
content_en:
Abu Bakr Abdullah ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Shaybah al-Absi al-Kufi was born in the year 159 AH in Kufa, a city that had by his era become one of the foremost centers of Islamic scholarship in the Muslim world. He grew up in an environment saturated with hadith transmission, surrounded by masters of the craft who had themselves studied under companions of the Companions. This scholarly milieu shaped him profoundly, instilling in him a fierce dedication to precision, authenticity, and breadth in the collection and criticism of prophetic traditions.

Ibn Abi Shaybah studied under some of the most eminent hadith scholars of his generation. Among his most influential teachers were Sufyan ibn Uyaynah, the great Meccan scholar; Hushaym ibn Bashir; Wakee ibn al-Jarrah; and Abu Muawiyah Muhammad ibn Khazim. Through these masters he inherited chains of transmission stretching back to the Companions themselves, giving his work a high degree of isnad authority. He was also a contemporary of Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal, and the two shared mutual respect and regularly exchanged traditions.

His fame spread across the Islamic world during his own lifetime. Scholars traveled long distances to sit in his circles and receive his narrations firsthand. Among those who learned from him were al-Bukhari, Muslim, Abu Dawud, Ibn Majah, and many others whose works went on to define the canonical hadith corpus. This network of students ensured that his legacy would be transmitted and preserved with great care across subsequent generations.

Ibn Abi Shaybah died in 235 AH at the age of seventy-six, leaving behind a monumental scholarly output. His most celebrated work, the Musannaf, stands as a testament to the extraordinary scope of his learning and the discipline of his method. Beyond the Musannaf, he also produced works on the history of the Companions, a musnad, and treatises on various legal and theological questions. In the estimation of medieval hadith critics, he ranks among the highest tier of hadith masters, with scholars such as ad-Dhahabi and Ibn Hajar al-Asqalani affirming his reliability and eminence across multiple domains of Islamic scholarship.
content_id:
Abu Bakar Abdullah ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Syaibah al-Absi al-Kufi lahir pada tahun 159 H di Kufah, sebuah kota yang pada zamannya telah menjadi salah satu pusat utama keilmuan Islam di dunia Muslim. Beliau tumbuh dalam lingkungan yang jenuh dengan periwayatan hadis, dikelilingi oleh para pakar yang mereka sendiri telah belajar kepada murid-murid para sahabat. Milieu ilmiah ini membentuk beliau secara mendalam, menanamkan dalam dirinya dedikasi yang kuat terhadap presisi, otentisitas, dan keluasan dalam pengumpulan serta kritik hadis-hadis Nabawi.

Ibn Abi Syaibah belajar kepada beberapa ulama hadis paling terkemuka di generasinya. Di antara guru-guru yang paling berpengaruh baginya adalah Sufyan ibn Uyainah, ulama besar Makkah; Husyaim ibn Basyir; Waki' ibn al-Jarrah; dan Abu Muawiyah Muhammad ibn Khazim. Melalui para guru ini beliau mewarisi sanad-sanad periwayatan yang membentang kembali hingga ke para sahabat itu sendiri, memberikan karyanya otoritas isnad yang tinggi. Beliau juga sezaman dengan Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal, dan keduanya saling menghormati serta secara teratur saling bertukar riwayat hadis.

Ketenaran beliau menyebar ke seluruh dunia Islam semasa hidupnya. Para ulama menempuh perjalanan jauh untuk duduk dalam majelis-majelis beliau dan menerima riwayat-riwayat beliau secara langsung. Di antara mereka yang belajar dari beliau adalah Al-Bukhari, Muslim, Abu Dawud, Ibn Majah, dan banyak lainnya yang karya-karya mereka kemudian mendefinisikan korpus hadis kanonik. Jaringan murid-murid ini memastikan bahwa warisannya akan diriwayatkan dan dilestarikan dengan penuh perhatian di generasi-generasi berikutnya.

Ibn Abi Syaibah wafat pada tahun 235 H pada usia tujuh puluh enam tahun, meninggalkan karya ilmiah yang monumental. Karya termasyhurnya, Musannaf, berdiri sebagai kesaksian atas cakupan pembelajaran beliau yang luar biasa dan kedisiplinan metodenya. Selain Musannaf, beliau juga menghasilkan karya-karya tentang sejarah para sahabat, sebuah musnad, dan risalah-risalah tentang berbagai pertanyaan hukum dan teologi. Dalam penilaian para kritikus hadis abad pertengahan, beliau termasuk di antara tingkatan tertinggi para imam hadis, dengan ulama-ulama seperti adz-Dzahabi dan Ibn Hajar al-Asqalani yang menegaskan keandalan dan keunggulan beliau di berbagai bidang keilmuan Islam.
